name: BPL Branches
description: A list of Brooklyn Public Library Branches, with branch name, locations, directions to, hours of services, name of contact person, and a brief description of the neighborhood the branch services.
note: type=href — an EXTERNAL DATASET link, not a live Socrata (SODA) table. It points off to a BPL-hosted file rather than exposing a queryable /resource/<id>.json endpoint or column schema. BPL is an independent nonprofit; the live, machine-readable branch data is on BPL's own Drupal JSON:API (node--branch).

name: BPL Electronic Resources
description: A list of electronic databases available at Brooklyn Public Library. Update schedule: As required.
note: type=href — an EXTERNAL DATASET link, not a live Socrata (SODA) table. The live, machine-readable equivalent is BPL's own Drupal JSON:API (node--eres).
